General.Name: M-Resources Group Limited
General.Description: Almana Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the household, plantation, and accessory business in the People's Republic of China, the United States, and Hong Kong. The company was formerly known as M-Resources Group Limited and changed its name to Almana Limited in July 2023. Almana Limited was incorporated in 2001 and is headquartered in Admiralty, Hong Kong.
General.Address: Two Pacific Place, Admiralty, Hong Kong
